args.query:
SELECT o.Id AS opp_id, TRIM(REPLACE(o.OwnerId,'#','')) AS owner_id, o.CreatedDate AS created_date, c.Id AS contract_id, c.CompanySignedDate AS company_signed_date
FROM Opportunity o
LEFT JOIN Contract c
ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#',''))
WHERE o.CreatedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND o.CreatedDate < '2023-05-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.Id AS opp_id, TRIM(REPLACE(o.OwnerId,'#','')) AS owner_id, o.CreatedDate AS created_date, c.Id AS contract_id, c.CompanySignedDate AS company_signed_date
FROM Opportunity o
LEFT JOIN Contract c
ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#',''))
WHERE o.CreatedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND o.CreatedDate < '2023-05-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL;
